title: Building Advanced Agents That Can Act with StackOne and ADK
subtitle: From zero to production-grade in 4 steps
speaker: Romain Sestier
description: A demo-focused talk showcasing how to build an ecommerce assistant agent using Google ADK + StackOne. Progressive upgrades from V0 (no tools) to V3+ (code mode + Defender), demonstrating Connect, Optimize, and Secure pillars.
